subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the supreme guidance! The Sun of Truth hath risen from the Horizon of Oneness with such effulgence that no veil can withstand it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بهدایت کبری شمس حقیقت از مشرق احدیت نه چنان اشراقی فرمود که بحجبات
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @light and darkness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
